import React, { useState } from 'react' import ReviewForm from './ReviewForm'; import { Button, Divider, Input, Radio, Space } from 'antd'; const ReviewBody = ({ setViewPage }: any) => { const [selectedValue, setSelectedValue] = useState(1); const handleChange = (value: any) => { setSelectedValue(value); }; type TRadioUi = { value: number; title: string, className?: string; children: React.ReactNode } const RadioUi = ({ value, children, title, className }: TRadioUi) => { return (
handleChange(value)} > {title} {selectedValue === value &&
{children}
}
) } return (
) } export default ReviewBody
